content.full_text:
April 24, 1991

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Attn: Legal Dept.
428 "J" Street, Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Sir:

Persuant to a recent inquiry, Mr. John Wallace said that the use of fax equipment does come under the regulation of Prop. 73.

Please confirm his answer in writing.

Most sincerely,

Clair W. Harmony
President
